privileged_info_summary: The task operates on standard public MySQL sample databases (Sakila and World), downloaded directly from MySQL documentation. Independent database analysis confirms that exactly 109 countries in the Sakila database map exactly to countries in the World database, making the minimum requirement of 40 row matches valid. The expected database artifacts (country_xref table, v_revenue_demographics view, and sp_continent_report procedure) and export paths (/home/ga/Documents/exports/asia_revenue_report.csv and /home/ga/Documents/exports/revenue_per_capita_ranking.csv) strictly match the verification scripts.
